Design system  /  Components  /  Form card
FormCard · light + dark variant lead-capture panel
Talk to us

Drop us a line.

For everything that isn't a GitHub issue. We pick up the phone during NL office hours.

Partner programme

Become a partner.

Three tiers, your pick. We'll come back with the certification + SLA terms within five working days.

React / MDX usage

Mount in MDX as <FormCard/>

Lead-capture panel with mono-uppercase eyebrow + h3 + lede + form fields + primary submit button. Two visual variants:

  • Default — white card on light surface; cobalt primary button. Used for the standard contact form.
  • variant="dark" — cobalt-900 card with translucent inputs; white-on-cobalt primary button. Used for high-stakes / commitment forms (partner application, demo request).

Import & example

import {FormCard, FieldRow, Field} from '@conduction/docusaurus-preset/components';

<FormCard
  eyebrow="Talk to us"
  title="Drop us a line."
  lede="For everything that isn't a GitHub issue..."
  submitLabel="Send"
  onSubmit={handleSubmit}
>
  <FieldRow>
    <Field label="First name" name="firstName" />
    <Field label="Last name"  name="lastName"  />
  </FieldRow>
  <Field label="Work email" name="email" type="email" />
  <Field label="Message" name="message" multiline rows={3} />
</FormCard>

Props

  • eyebrow mono-uppercase label rendered with a KNVB-orange hex bullet
  • title sentence-case h3
  • lede 1–2-sentence intro under the title
  • variant default / dark (default default)
  • submitLabel button text (default Send)
  • onSubmit form submit handler
  • children <Field/> or <FieldRow/> nodes
